name: Norwegian Molasses Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the lard and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Beat in molasses.
4. Sift together flour, baking soda, and salt.
5. Gradually stir the sifted ingredients into the creamed mixture.
6. Cover with plastic wrap and chill for 1 hour in the refrigerator.
7. Shape the dough into 1 ¼-inch balls.
8. Place the balls 2 inches apart on greased baking sheets.
9. Bake in a 350°F oven for 18 minutes or until golden brown.
10. Remove from baking sheets; cool on racks.
